name: ACP Billing Services
description: Orlando-based medical billing company with over 15 years of experience handling Medicare and commercial insurance claims across multiple specialties. Serves hospitals, physician offices, clinics, and outpatient facilities throughout Florida with 99% clean claim submission rate and less than 2% denial rate.

name: AnnexMed
description: Leading medical billing and revenue cycle management provider supporting Florida practices across more than 40 specialties. Offers full-service RCM including coding, billing, AR follow-up, and denial prevention with over 20 years of experience.

name: CBS Medical Billing
description: Provides full-service revenue cycle management to Florida healthcare practices with extensive experience with Medicare, Medicare Advantage, and O&P claims common in Florida's senior care landscape.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Every step of the process is easier because the CBS team is attentive and proactive.
CBS is extremely knowledgeable and made our billing process so much easier.
They took on a year-long project and handled it with professionalism and clarity.

sentiment.summary: CBS Medical Billing receives consistently positive reviews highlighting their attentiveness, expertise, and ability to streamline billing processes with professionalism.

name: MBW RCM
description: Florida's most cost-effective and results-driven medical billing service provider. Combines AI-driven automation, data analytics, and human expertise to maximize revenue for healthcare practices.

name: MGSI, LLC
description: One of the most established medical billing outsourcing companies in Florida with over 30 years in the industry. Offers competitive pricing through automation and scale.

name: PracticeForces
description: Medical billing management services provider serving medical practices and hospitals in the US since 2003. Offers billing services starting at 2.99%.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Highly recommend PracticeForces to anyone looking for a medical billing service
They have always been very attentive to our needs. Parul is a sweetheart
Extremely knowledgeable and professional. They are trustworthy, diligent and proactive
Do an excellent job with collecting money from Insurance companies. Highly recommend

sentiment.summary: Overwhelmingly positive reputation with consistent praise from long-term clients for professionalism, attentiveness, reliability, and effective insurance collection.

name: PureMD
description: Prominent medical billing company in Florida known for reliable and consistent results. Provides efficient billing services to help healthcare organizations and practices improve cash flow, reduce errors, and stay compliant with real-time dashboards and clear financial reports.

name: Swift Medical Billing Services
description: Medical billing company specializing in personalized service suitable for owner-run clinics and small practices. Provides end-to-end medical billing and claims management with coding support and audits.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: It has been one of the best choices we've made
This service has been a complete game changer for our practice
Swift made our credentialing process seamless and stress-free

sentiment.summary: Swift Medical Billing Services receives consistently exceptional reviews, with clients praising professionalism, efficiency, cost savings, and transformative impact on practice operations.
